# Lewis Clegg — Graphic Designer

> A graphic designer based in Halifax, West Yorkshire, UK.

## About

Lewis Clegg is a graphic designer specialising in branding, editorial design, and print. Based in Halifax, West Yorkshire, he works with organisations and independent businesses to build visual identities that connect with their audience.

## Contact

- Email: hello@lewisclegg.co.uk
- Location: Halifax, West Yorkshire, United Kingdom

## Selected Work

### MAMIL — Branding & Menu Design (2021)
Branding, experiential and menu design for a small chain of cycling cafes in Calderdale. The brand plays off the cycling term "Middle Aged Man in Lycra" with a logomark that subtly references cycling culture. Includes logo, menus, wall murals, and full visual identity across three locations.

### St Peter's Consort — Identity, Posters & Socials (2018–present)
Visual transformation for an established choir with over four decades of history. Developed a strategic design system with disciplined typographic templates, establishing clear information hierarchy across posters, programmes, and social media.

### Wheelers Review — Editorial Design & Publishing (2022–present)
Self-initiated annual magazine documenting the Halifax Imperial Wheelers cycling club. A 90–140 page premium publication built on a rigorous modular grid, featuring long-form ride reports, curated photography, and local cycling history. Sole editor, designer, and production manager.

## Expertise

Brand Identity, Logo Design, Print Design, Editorial & Publishing, Poster Design, Menu Design, Social Media, Art Direction, Web Design
